---
title: "Presenter Info"
description: "Talk & poster guidelines, timing, file formats."
date: 2026-04-05
categories: [presenters, logistics]
---

## Oral presentations
- Oral presentations will be 20 minutes of talk followed by 10 minutes of Q&A.

## In-person posters
- There will be two traditional in-person poster sessions held outside Room 56-114 (where oral presentations take place). 
- We recommend printing your poster on A1-sized paper. 

## Flash talks (remote posters)
- There will be one "flash talk" session for remote poster presenters. 
- Flash talks consist of 10-minute pre-recorded presentations followed by 5-minute live Q&A sessions. 
- If you are presenting a flash talk, please send us [turkicworkshop@gmail.com](mailto:turkicworkshop@gmail.com) a 10-minute recording of your presentation by the end of day on **April 10 (Friday)**. Feel free to present with either slides or posters.
